checks.actual: R 4.6.1, DESeq2 1.52.0, ggplot2/apeglm versions not verified
Conclusion matches: inflammatory genes upregulated, anti-apoptotic genes downregulated
All 6 core genes match expected direction
Neither GO:0006954 nor GO:0019221 found; related terms present (GO:0002675, GO:0002367)
17 inflammatory, 19 cytokine, 45 apoptotic terms found; top 10 dominated by apoptotic 'absence of ligand' sub-terms
4 upper-right (IL6,TNF,CXCL8,IL1B), 4 upper-left (BCL2,MCL1,VEGFA,EGFR), 12 near origin; core 6 genes correctly positioned
Top 10 dominated by apoptotic 'absence of ligand' sub-terms; inflammatory/cytokine terms not in top 10
TNF signaling pathway rendered; IL6, TNF, IL1B in red; correct coloring scheme
Conclusion supported: IL6/TNF/CXCL8/IL1B upregulated, BCL2/MCL1 downregulated

deviations.magnitude: 2 additional genes (VEGFA padj=0.021, EGFR padj=0.041) with small fold changes
deviations.likely_cause: DESeq2 version difference (1.52.0 vs 1.42.0) may affect significance boundary sensitivity

deviations.deviation: Paper-specific GO term IDs (GO:0006954, GO:0019221) not found in results
deviations.magnitude: Exact IDs absent; related terms present at different ranks
deviations.likely_cause: Different DE gene set (8 vs 6 genes) and different background gene universe produce different GO term rankings and IDs

deviations.deviation: GO bar plot top 10 dominated by apoptotic 'absence of ligand' sub-terms instead of inflammatory/cytokine terms
deviations.magnitude: Inflammatory/cytokine terms present but ranked outside top 10
deviations.likely_cause: Small DE gene set (8 genes) causes GO hierarchy effects; 'absence of ligand' sub-terms have very small background sizes (27-45 genes) producing extreme fold enrichment

deviations.deviation: Software versions do not match paper
deviations.likely_cause: Newer package versions installed; paper specified older versions
DESeq2 version difference and/or different normalization
